predicates.name: has_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person possesses Belgian nationality (directly assertable background status).

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien: they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is in illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the determination of or transfer to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: eligible_for_risk_of_absconding_assessment
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or responsible Member State determination procedure, making a risk of absconding assessment possible.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the person based on individual examination and objective criteria.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_country_authority
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, and that authority has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three identification criteria.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 1 is met: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

predicates.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 2 is met: the person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, or committed fraud or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or falsified documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 3 is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 4 is met: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal measure, entry ban, less coercive measure, liberty-restricting measure, or equivalent measure by another Member State.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_by_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those listed in criterion 4(a) through 4(d).

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 5 is met: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 6 is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 7 is met: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 8 is met: the person has submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_protection_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States that have given rise to a negative decision or have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_residence_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States that have given rise to a negative decision or have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 9 is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had previously already submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining such an application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 10 is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
predicates.description: The person has declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: file_shows_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
predicates.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: Absconding criterion 11 is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria (1 through 11) is met for the person.
